round_meta.build_target: PM revised prompt: pre-code checklist + scanner-safe env names + plot/intermediate polish + visual loop folder

file_map: assets/models/environment/* — scatter mesh sources; filename stems must match _environment_grass_and_doodad_model_lists() token rules.
assets/models/Models/Kenny raw downloads (for exact paths)/kenney_nature-kit — GLB/GLTF source for grass/flower/bush copies.
assets/models/Models/Kenny raw downloads (for exact paths)/kenney_graveyard-kit_5.0/Models/OBJ format — rock OBJ promotion targets.
assets/models/Models/Kenny raw downloads (for exact paths)/kenney_survival-kit/Models/OBJ format — log OBJ promotion targets.
game/graphics/ursina_renderer.py — _environment_grass_and_doodad_model_lists (grass vs doodad buckets by stem prefix).
architecture_options: OPT A — Promote/rename under assets/models/environment/ with scanner-friendly stems (grass*, tuft*, flower*, bush*, rock*, log*, stump*, mushroom*). PROS: zero renderer code. CONS: duplicate bytes vs raw tree. RISK: LOW. EFFORT: M.
OPT B — Broaden scanner in ursina_renderer to match nature_* prefixes. PROS: keep arbitrary names. CONS: code churn; violates PM recommendation. RISK: MED. EFFORT: S for 03.
OPT C — Sidecar manifest of env meshes. PROS: explicit curation. CONS: new contract + reader. RISK: MED. EFFORT: L.
pre_code_checklist.architecture_chosen: OPT A — aligns with PM pre-reasoned recommendation; fixes silent failure where nature_bush_* did not match bush* prefix.
existing_code_conflicts: Stems must start with bush/log/stump/mushroom/rock for doodad bucket — documented in PM hub BUG-003/004 notes.
pack_color_multiplier (Agent 12) will darken env/ meshes — pick sources that read acceptable at ~0.75.
Plot JSON building_type plot vs sim keys — resolver loads plot_{w}x{h}_v1.json by path; schema documents plot_1x1 / plot_2x2 / plot_3x3 exception.

what_i_changed: Renamed environment GLBs: bush_small/large, rock_small_a/b/c, log_wide, stump_round, mushroom_tan (scanner-compatible; replaces nature_* names that did not match token rules).

Promoted Graveyard rocks-graveyard.obj → rock_gy_cluster.obj, rocks-tall-graveyard.obj → rock_gy_tall.obj (+ mtls); Survival tree-log.obj → log_survival.obj, tree-log-small.obj → log_small.obj (+ mtls).
Re-authored plot_1x1_v1 (≤3 pcs: pad, rope crate, shovel), plot_2x2_v1 (5 corner stones + scaffold), plot_3x3_v1 (7 pcs foundation ring + beams); building_type plot_1x1 / plot_2x2 / plot_3x3.
Tightened peasant_house_small_build_20_v1 (1 pc) and build_50_v1 (1 pc) to meet piece-count discipline vs final (2 pcs).
tools/assets_manifest.json — environment.types updated to new stems + rock_gy_* / log_survival / log_small.

assets/ATTRIBUTION.md — environment path lines updated for renamed + OBJ promotions.
